sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 68:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 68:1
items.html: The rule is that the upper light does not stop shining for the emanated beings even for a moment. Wherever a proper vessel of extension is revealed, the upper light immediately shines there. Therefore, after the extension of phase four within phase four was filled, she engendered a form of a new vessel of extension, in which there is the coarseness of phase three in phase four, and it, too, was instantly filled with the upper light. Afterwards, when a new form of coarseness, of phase two within phase four, was emanated and emerged from it, it, too, was instantly filled with the upper light, and this is always so.
